title: Trump aide Josh Gruenbaum dropped from Ukraine, Iran roles: Here's why he was sidelined
summary_full: Josh Gruenbaum, formerly an adviser to Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff on Russia-Ukraine and Iran policy, will now exclusively focus on Gaza Strip issues through the independent Board of Peace. This shift follows internal concerns about his working style, reducing his responsibilities from key foreign policy matters.
